prestazioni: Replace the stock 1.8L N-series engine (N476) with a forged internals build featuring Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a steel crankshaft from a Rover K-series VVC donor (K16 1.8L) for increased rev-happy durability. Pair with a custom billet oil pump from Quaife to handle 8,500 RPM redline.

Install a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Janspeed, mated to a GReddy Type-S intercooler (400x160x65mm core) and a custom 3-inch aluminum charge piping system with silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance. Use a Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU with a custom map for 280+ HP on 98 RON fuel.

Upgrade the stock C59 gearbox with a Quaife ATB differential and a close-ratio gear set from a Rover 220 Turbo (PG1 gearbox), paired with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm) and a lightweight flywheel from Fidanza (10.5 lbs). Replace the stock driveshafts with custom CV-jointed units from GKN Driveline for durability under high torque.
estetica: Fit a full carbon fiber widebody kit from Seibon Carbon, including front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom rear diffuser designed specifically for the ZR 160’s chassis. Use OEM-spec mounting points for seamless integration.

Install a custom front splitter from APR Performance (GT-250 model, modified for ZR 160 bumper) and a custom rear wing from Voltex (Type 3, 1,200mm width) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals for adjustable angle. Paint all aero in matte British Racing Green with gold pinstriping.

Replace the stock interior with Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara, MG-logo embroidered) and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (8-point, T45 steel, bolt-in design). Add a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (320mm, suede) and a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada (5-inch display, integrated with Syvecs ECU).
